settings.heading: How does up 200 night sleep trial work?
settings.content: custom
settings.customContent:
We provide a risk-free sleep trial on all our mattresses. This allows you to sleep on a REM-Fit for up to 200-nights (if you buy it with a mattress protector) in the comfort of your own home and really put it to the test!

If the mattress, for whatever reason doesn't live up to your expectations, you can send it back for a full refund without collection charges!

We request that you give your new REM-Fit mattress 30 nights to bed-in before you raise a return. This will give your body the right amount of time to fully adjust.

settings.heading: Delivery information
settings.content: custom
settings.customContent:
Experience swift and seamless service with our *free 1-3 day delivery to UK addresses! Our dedicated 2-person team ensures your new mattress is delivered right to your room of choice.

Enhance your convenience further by opting for old mattress removal at checkout for a nominal fee.

Enjoy complete flexibility with delivery dates: Our courier will contact you via email and WhatsApp, providing a selection of dates to choose from. The day before delivery, you'll receive a precise 3-hour time window. Plus, our drivers will give you a call when they're just 30 minutes away - Your comfort is our priority!

settings.heading: Dimensions & Weight
settings.content: metafield

settings.heading: I have a bad back - will this mattress help?
settings.content: custom
settings.customContent: As non-medical professionals we make no guarantees that the mattress will improve your back complaint. However, we have designed our mattress range with a focus on back support. We also receive lots of positive feedback from sleepers who have suffered with a bad back to discover that sleeping on a REM-Fit mattress has relieved their pain and enabled them to get a great night's rest.

settings.heading: Mattress tension guide
settings.content: custom
Tired of Sleeping Hot?

REM-Fit memory foam benefits from a revolutionary open-cell construction keeping it cool!

Proven to wick moisture and dissipate heat away from the body keeping your sleep environment at just the right temperature

15-Year Trust: REM-Fit's Durability Promise

At REM-Fit, durability is key.

We rigorously test our mattresses using the Juggernaut machine, which simulates 15 years of use, ensuring they meet our high standards of durability.

Watch the video to see our process in action and discover how our products stand the test of time.

settings.heading: What's the catch?
settings.content: There are no catches. if the mattress, for whatever reason doesn't live up to your expectations, you can send it back for a full refund without collection charges!

settings.heading: Bedding-In

settings.heading: How to return?
settings.content: How do I raise a return request? Simply email us at sales@rem-fit.co.uk. Please note, our live chat assistants cannot process return requests.

settings.heading: Up to 200 night sleep trial, to do as you please with it

settings.content: Boost your mattress sleep trial to 200 nights!

Just purchase a REM-Fit mattress protector along with your mattress. Remember to select the correct size for the perfect fit!

✅ 200-Night Sleep Trial
✅ Shield mattress: block stains, extend life
We never waste a returned mattress

We donate our mattresses to the British Heart Foundation. In order for them to sell the mattress on through their network of UK based stores the mattress needs to be in a clean and usable condition.

100% of proceeds go towards the British Heart Foundation charity.
Our mattresses passed stringent CertiPUR testing

✔️ Made without heavy metals such as mercury, lead, or cadmium

✔️ Made without dyes that are carcinogenic or allergenic as described by EU legislation

✔️ Made without Phthalate plasticisers

✔️ Made without substances that cause cancer or heritable genetic damage

✔️ Emitting low levels of VOCs (volatile organic compounds)

settings.question: How does the 100-night trial work?
settings.answer: We provide a risk-free sleep trial on all our mattresses. This allows you to sleep on a REM-Fit for 100-nights in the comfort of your own home and really put it to the test! There are no catches. If the mattress, for whatever reason doesn’t live up to your expectations, you can send it back for a full refund. There are no collection charges either! View more info here

settings.question: Why are REM-Fit springs superior to your counterparts?
settings.answer: Unlike our counterparts we use tall pocket springs constructed from triple tempered steel. Each spring is contained within its own pocket of fabric which prevents the spring system from rubbing against each other, nothing worse than a squeaky mattress! Tall pocket springs compared to mini springs (only) provide superior support and will isolate partner disturbance movement more effectively. Don't worry about feeling the springs through the mattress, you can't, we place them deep beneath the top layers of the mattress so that they are never noticeable.

settings.question: What base can the mattress go on?
settings.answer: Thanks to the high-density foam layer of the mattress you can confidently use the mattress on any bed base including adjustable beds!

settings.question: I have a bad back - will this mattress help?
settings.answer: As non-medical professionals we make no guarantees that the mattress will improve your back complaint. However, we have designed our mattress range with a focus on back support. We also receive lots of positive feedback from sleepers who have suffered with a bad back to discover that sleeping on a REM-Fit mattress has relieved their pain and enabled them to get a great night's rest.
